top_signals.title: AI is designing OpenAI's next model in a sign of 'superintelligence': SoftBank's Masayoshi Son to CNBC
top_signals.summary: SoftBank CEO Masayoshi Son said his forecast of artificial superintelligence arriving in 10 years was "conservative" and thinks it will be here sooner.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
